name: Goldie Table Lamp - 18 Inch Height - TBL4566 - Brass/White - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the elegant and sophisticated design of the Goldie Inch Table Lamp. This stylish lamp features a sleek metal body and shade, gracefully combined in a classic brass and white color scheme. With dimensions thoughtfully crafted to enhance any room, the lamp boasts a height of 18.5 inches (47 cm), a shade diameter of 10 inches (25.5 cm), and a base diameter of 6.25 inches (16 cm).

The seamless integration of the white dome shade and the striking brass finish of the body adds a touch of refinement to your desk, bedside table, or living area. The 60-inch (152 cm) power cord provides ample length for versatile placement options. Whether you're setting the mood in a quiet corner or highlighting your favorite reading spot, the Goldie Inch Table Lamp is an inviting addition to your decor, delivering both functionality and style.
